prompt: Give me the product state tree from .garura/product/scope/features.yaml. Do NOT summarize or narrate -- just the tree. Preserve YAML order, don't sort. If a feature has no `issue` field, skip the `: [#123]` slot entirely (no empty brackets).

assertions.text: No feature row contains '[#' (issue slot entirely omitted)
No feature row contains '[]' or empty brackets for the issue slot
Every feature row ends with a status bracket
Features appear in document order from features.yaml (AM-F001 before AM-F002, EO-F001 before EO-F005)
Output is pure tree — no headers, no prose, no totals, no 'Summary:' line
Uses exact 2-space indent per level — not tabs, not 4 spaces, not tree-drawing characters like ├── or └──
